final_verdict.summary: PASS. All 17 approved-contract verification commands independently re-run from repo root and all exited 0/PASS, matching the generator's captured evidence. bash tools/validate.sh reports the full default sweep at SUMMARY: 11 passed, 0 failed (exit 0) with [C8] PASS and [C11] PASS. Adversarial checks confirm: README's C1-C11 body enumeration is genuine (all 11 individually present, not a bare substring hit) and its 0.2.0->0.3.0 bump is recorded via a real frontmatter change_log entry (parsed via YAML) that C8 actually reads; CHANGELOG.md's [Unreleased] section (independently boundary-parsed) -- not any released section -- names verify_lib.sh, contract_review.schema.json, e2e_bootstrap_test.sh, and C9/C10/C11, and this is proven non-vacuous against the pre-change HEAD copy of CHANGELOG.md. Human gates (v0.6.0 tag, GitHub Pages workflow) are confirmed NOT auto-executed. docs/planning/DEBT.md and NIZAM.json are confirmed byte-identical to HEAD (NDEBT-002 stays in Resolved only; framework.version stays 0.5.1), and validate.sh/verify_lib.sh/e2e harness/all schemas are unchanged. Scope is exactly the two contracted files (tools/README.md, CHANGELOG.md); no branding leakage. No issues, no missing acceptance coverage, no unsupported claims found.
